scripts.build:ezorm: pnpm --dir packages/core run build && pnpm --dir packages/orm run build && pnpm --dir packages/cli run build
scripts.example:build: pnpm --filter @ezorm/example-todo-domain test && pnpm --filter @ezorm/example-nest-todo-api build && pnpm --filter @ezorm/example-next-todo-web build
scripts.example:test: pnpm --filter @ezorm/example-todo-domain test && pnpm --filter @ezorm/example-nest-todo-api test && pnpm --filter @ezorm/example-next-todo-web test
scripts.release:check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:ts && cargo test && node ./scripts/npm-release.mjs assert-workspace-version && pnpm pack:packages && pnpm smoke:ezorm && pnpm smoke:proxy-node
